Workflow.name: Create Entitlement Group
Workflow.Description: Creates a new entitlement group with specified parameters

Step.name: Validate Input
Step.Description: Validate that all required parameters are provided

Step.name: Get Application Object
Step.Description: Retrieve the Application object by name

Step.name: Check Group Existence
Step.Description: Check if entitlement group already exists

Step.name: Decision - Group Exists
Step.Description: Route based on whether group already exists

Step.name: Return Existing Group
Step.Description: Return the existing entitlement group ID
